title: 🚨 NWS Moderate: Wind Advisory
summary:
* WHAT...South winds 35 to 45 mph with gusts up to 65 mph expected.

* WHERE...Eastern Alaska Range North of Trims Camp.

* WHEN...Until 4 PM AKDT Friday.

* IMPACTS...Gusty winds will blow around unsecured objects. Tree
limbs could be blown down and a few power outages may result.
Winds this strong can make driving difficult, especially for high
profile vehicles. Use extra caution.
sourceAttribution: Source: National Weather Service CAP Feed

title: 🚨 NWS Severe: High Wind Warning
summary:
* WHAT...South winds 40 to 50 mph with gusts up to 75 mph.

* WHERE...Eastern Alaska Range North of Trims Camp.

* WHEN...Until 4 PM AKDT Friday.

* IMPACTS...Gusty winds will blow around unsecured objects. Tree
limbs could be blown down and a few power outages may result.
Winds this strong can make driving difficult, especially for high
profile vehicles. Use extra caution.

title: 🚨 NWS Moderate: Winter Weather Advisory
summary:
* WHAT...Snow and blowing snow. Additional snow accumulations up to
one inch. Winds gusting as high as 35 mph.

* WHERE...Point Lay.

* WHEN...Until noon AKDT today.

* IMPACTS...Travel may be impacted. Areas of blowing snow could
reduce visibility.
Slow down and use caution while traveling.
sourceAttribution: Source: National Weather Service CAP Feed

title: 🚨 NWS Moderate: Winter Weather Advisory
summary:
* WHAT...Snow. Additional snow accumulations up to two inches.

* WHERE...Interior Seward Peninsula and Southern Seward Peninsula
Coast.

* WHEN...Until 4 PM AKDT this afternoon.

* IMPACTS...Travel may be impacted due to areas of blowing snow.
Slow down and use caution while traveling. Visit 511.alaska.gov or
call 5 1 1 for the latest road conditions.
sourceAttribution: Source: National Weather Service CAP Feed

title: 🚨 NWS Moderate: Winter Weather Advisory

* WHERE...Baldwin Peninsula, Lower Kobuk Valley, and Northern Seward

title: 🚨 NWS Extreme: Blizzard Warning
summary:

* WHERE...Bering Strait Coast.

* WHEN...Until 4 PM AKDT this afternoon.

* IMPACTS...Travel could be difficult. Areas of blowing snow could
significantly reduce visibility.

title: 🚨 NWS Extreme: Blizzard Warning
summary:
* WHAT...Blizzard conditions. Additional snow accumulations between

* IMPACTS...Travel could be very difficult. Areas of blowing snow

title: 🚨 NWS Severe: Flood Watch
summary:
* WHAT...Flooding caused by rain and snowmelt is possible.

* WHERE...The following areas, Central Susitna Valley, Southern
Susitna Valley and Western Susitna Valley.  This includes the
communities of Skwentna, Willow, Talkeetna, Trapper Creek, And
Petersville.

* WHEN...From 9 PM AKDT this evening through Saturday morning.
